capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a security architecture management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a security architecture management service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise architecture management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the architecture management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for architecture management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether architecture management KPIs and KRIs are documented
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for architecture management

questions.prompt: Are architecture management KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track segmentation coverage, design review completion rate, or encryption compliance across segments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether segmentation and design review metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Segmentation coverage and design review metrics

questions.prompt: Does the organization measure API security and inter-segment communication compliance as part of architecture KPIs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether encryption and API security compliance metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Encryption and API security compliance metrics

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy network and application segmentation based on an existing segmentation strategy or industry standards?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether segmentation follows a documented strategy or standards
questions.evaluation_focus: Segmentation strategy or industry standards

questions.prompt: Is network and application segmentation deployed enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether segmentation is deployed enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide network and application segmentation deployment

questions.prompt: Is segmentation automated or performed manually based on functional requirements?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether segmentation supports automation by functional requirement
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated or manual segmentation by functional requirement

questions.prompt: Is network and application segmentation reviewed at least quarterly to enhance security?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether segmentation is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular segmentation review for security enhancement

questions.prompt: Are staging, development, and deployment segments separated physically or logically with enforced boundaries?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether staging, development, and deployment segments are separated
questions.evaluation_focus: Physical separation of staging, development, and deployment segments

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise encrypt data in motion between segments enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether data in motion is encrypted between segments
questions.evaluation_focus: Data in motion encryption enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Does the cryptographic solution provide the enterprise with cryptographic agility to respond to algorithm or key lifecycle changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the cryptographic solution supports agility
questions.evaluation_focus: Cryptographic agility

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy active/active network architecture such that failure of one availability zone does not impact the other?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether active/active network architecture is deployed
questions.evaluation_focus: Active/active network across availability zones

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have at least two availability zones?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether at least two availability zones exist
questions.evaluation_focus: At least two availability zones

questions.prompt: Can the network provide alternate paths to workloads during failure to reduce impact on end users and applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether alternate path failover is supported
questions.evaluation_focus: Alternate path failover for workloads

questions.prompt: Is single point of failure analysis performed to identify unforeseen network failures?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SPOF analysis is performed for the network
questions.evaluation_focus: Single point of failure analysis

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for security architecture design reviews?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formalized design review process exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented design review process

questions.prompt: Do design reviews account for AI-era threat models and zero-trust architecture principles?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether design reviews incorporate AI-era and zero-trust considerations
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-era and zero-trust considerations in design reviews

questions.prompt: Is the design review process reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the design review process is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular design review process efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy technology that supports secure API communications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether technology supports secure API communications
questions.evaluation_focus: Technology supporting secure API communications

questions.prompt: Are functional segments and applications deployed to support secure communications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether segments and applications support secure communications
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure communications across functional segments and applications

questions.prompt: Are communications between applications monitored and reviewed at least quarterly to confirm they remain secure?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether inter-application communications are monitored and reviewed
questions.evaluation_focus: Monitoring and review of inter-application communications

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy function-based network security controls across enterprise functional segments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether function-based network security controls are deployed
questions.evaluation_focus: Function-based network security controls across segments

questions.prompt: Are network security controls reviewed at least quarterly to measure efficacy and enhance security posture?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network security controls are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular network security control efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have capability to securely migrate workloads from on-premises to cloud segments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether secure on-premises to cloud migration is supported
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure on-premises to cloud workload migration

questions.prompt: Can cloud migration take place across all locations in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cloud migration covers all enterprise locations
questions.evaluation_focus: Cloud migration across all enterprise locations

questions.prompt: Does the cloud platform support automated migration from on-premises segments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cloud migration can be automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated cloud migration from on-premises segments

questions.prompt: Are cloud migration processes reviewed at least quarterly for secure transmission and user experience?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cloud migration processes are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular cloud migration process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated team that manages and tracks architectural changes across the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a dedicated AMO team exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Dedicated AMO team for architectural change management

questions.prompt: Does the AMO measure threat risk and review relevant architectural upgrades?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the AMO measures threat risk and reviews upgrades
questions.evaluation_focus: Threat risk measurement and architectural upgrade review

questions.prompt: Does architecture governance account for AI-era threats such as accelerated vulnerability discovery and expanded attack surfaces?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI-era threats inform architecture governance
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-era threat awareness in architecture governance
